Prepares product costings and suggested selling prices of new products of the operating companies. Worked closely with the external auditors in preparing the Audited Financial Reports of the Group for annual filing to the BIR and SEC.

My other responsibilities include drafting of Board Resolutions, Secretary's Certificates, Deed of Assignments and other corporate and/or legal documents in addition to drafting policies and procedures in relation to my position as Finance Head of the group and oversee the implementation of the same among the personnel concerned.
